context: AF & DR Class — DR barre and enchaînement; AF pirouettes, ballonné, adage

corrections.text: Use all the music at the barre — finishing phrases early or rushing
Jeté passé doesn't travel — should be compact and directional
Passé dropping at 1.5 turns — retiré losing anchor mid-rotation
Spot appearing late as a consequence of passé dropping
Gesture foot not snapping into full point at apex of ballonné — active pointing, not passive stretch
Engage back and core for height in arabesque
Back compresses and grips at end range — more pronounced in grand battement than controlled arabesque
Hip flexor length work needed — back gripping is downstream of hip flexor range, not a back strength problem

openQuestions: Identify which specific DR exercises were flagged for review
